 COST_HH 
 MSPB home health costs 

 COST_HOSPICE 
 MSPB hospice costs 

 COST_ER_IMAGING 
 MSPB imaging costs in an ER setting 

 COST_IP_TRIGGER 
 MSPB inpatient costs incurred during hospitalization 

 COST_IP_READMIT 
 MSPB inpatient costs incurred in a readmission after hospitalization within 30 days of discharge 

 COST_REHAB_LTCH 
 MSPB inpatient rehabilitation or long-term care hospital costs 

 COST_ER_TESTS 
 MSPB lab, pathology, and other test
